title: lindsaea brevipes
intro: Lindsaea brevipes, also known as the short-foot maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea brevipes include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparation of Lindsaea brevipes typically involves drying the fronds and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and capsules for medicinal use.
